user_query:
I saved a few BitMart API response snapshots under input/. Please read them and produce a consolidated swap quote comparison across three native-to-stable swaps:

Pairs:
- ETH -> USDC on Ethereum (chainId 2003)
- BNB -> USDT on BSC (chainId 2002)
- SOL -> USDT on Solana (chainId 2001)

Files to read:
- input/eth_usdc_token_search.json (search results for USDC on Ethereum)
- input/eth_usdc_token_info.json (token info for Ethereum USDC)
- input/bsc_usdt_token_search.json (search results for USDT on BSC)
- input/bsc_usdt_token_info.json (token info for BSC USDT)
- input/sol_usdt_token_search.json (search results for USDT on Solana)
- input/sol_usdt_token_info.json (token info for Solana USDT)
- input/eth_usdc_swap_quote.json (ETH->USDC quote snapshot)
- input/bsc_usdt_swap_quote.json (BNB->USDT quote snapshot)
- input/sol_usdt_swap_quote.json (SOL->USDT quote snapshot)

What to do:
1) Resolve tokens using the token-search and token-info files for each pair to determine tokenOutId, contract addresses, decimals, and chainId. Do not guess.
2) Create output/param_payloads.json with one object per swap (keys: eth_to_usdc, bnb_to_usdt, sol_to_usdt) containing: chainId, tokenInId, tokenOutId, tokenInAddress, tokenOutAddress, tokenInDecimals, tokenOutDecimals, fromChainId, toChainId, slippage (use 0.1), amountIn (exactly as in the corresponding swap quote snapshot). Apply the native token address handling rules: for EVM native tokens, tokenInAddress must be "" (empty string); for Solana native tokens, tokenInAddress must be So11111111111111111111111111111111111111111. Use the contract from token-info for tokenOutAddress.
3) Create output/quotes_summary.json with one object per swap (same keys) including: amountIn, amountOut, impliedRate (amountOut/amountIn rounded to 6 decimals), tokenInPrice, tokenOutPrice, fee, and chainMatch (true if fromChainId == toChainId == the token chainId). Also include top-level fields highestInputUsdSymbol and highestInputUsdValue based on the largest tokenInPrice among the three.
4) Create a brief comparison report at output/quotes_report.md (3–5 lines) that names all three pairs and compares implied rates and fees. Include a final line exactly: "Highest USD per unit of input: ETH".

Write all outputs under output/ exactly as specified.
